title: Pungent Spring Roasted Italian Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting Calabrian-inspired casserole featuring tender chicken, fragrant elderflower, and crispy broiled cheese.

ingredients.name: calabrian chili flakes
ingredients.notes: or substitute with red pepper flakes

instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, Calabrian chili flakes, and garlic.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the elderflower and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cubed bread to the skillet and cook until lightly toasted.
Transfer the toasted bread to the baking dish with the chicken.
Sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese and shredded mozzarella cheese over the chicken and bread.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and top with chopped parsley and basil.
Return the casserole to the oven and broil for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
